info.title: Sun-over-HTTP API
info.description:
HTTP service that returns solar position data (sunrise, sunset, twilights, solar noon, and sun angles) for any location on Earth.

Powered by the **NREL Solar Position Algorithm** (SPA) via [go-spa](https://github.com/maltegrosse/go-spa), accurate to **±0.0003°** in azimuth and zenith (Reda & Andreas, 2004). Valid for years −2000 to 6000.

Optional physical parameters (`elevation`, `pressure`, `temperature`, `delta_t`) allow fine-tuning the atmospheric refraction and ΔT correction. When omitted, defaults are applied and ΔT is auto-estimated using the Espenak & Meeus (2006) polynomial.

All times are returned in the observer's timezone specified by the `timezone` field (IANA format, default UTC).

post.summary: Get solar data for a given location and time
post.description: Accepts a JSON body describing the observer location, optional physical parameters, and optional timestamp. Returns sunrise, sunset, solar noon, twilight times, sun angles at key moments, and the instantaneous sun position at the requested timestamp. Powered by the NREL SPA algorithm.

paris_now.summary: Paris — current time, default physical params

mountain_station.summary: High-altitude station with all physical params

200.description: Solar data for the requested location and time.

400.description: Bad request — missing or invalid field.

405.description: Method not allowed — only POST is accepted.

timezone.description: IANA timezone name of the observer's location. All output times are expressed in this timezone (default: UTC).

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in seconds (UTC epoch). Determines the target day and the instantaneous sun position. Defaults to current time when omitted.

elevation.description: Observer altitude above sea level in metres. Affects atmospheric refraction correction in the NREL SPA. Default: 0 m.

pressure.description: Atmospheric pressure at the observer's location in hPa (millibars). Affects refraction correction. Default: 1013.25 hPa (standard atmosphere at sea level).

temperature.description: Air temperature at the observer's location in degrees Celsius. Affects refraction correction. Default: 12 °C (ICAO standard atmosphere, low altitude).

delta_t.description: Difference between Terrestrial Time (TT) and UT1 in seconds (ΔT = TT − UT1). If omitted, estimated automatically using the Espenak & Meeus (2006) polynomial (accuracy ±5 s for 2005–2050). Current value: ~69 s.

timezone.description: IANA timezone of the observer's location.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp of UTC midnight of the target local date.

date.description: Target date (YYYY-MM-DD) in the observer's timezone.

observer_elevation_m.description: Observer altitude used in the NREL SPA computation (metres).

observer_pressure_hpa.description: Atmospheric pressure used in the NREL SPA computation (hPa).

observer_temperature_c.description: Air temperature used in the NREL SPA computation (°C).

delta_t_s.description: ΔT value used in the NREL SPA computation (seconds). Either provided by the caller or auto-estimated.

sunrise.description: Sunrise time (HH:MM:SS) in the observer's timezone. Empty string during polar night.

sunset.description: Sunset time (HH:MM:SS). Empty string during polar day.

solar_noon.description: Solar noon — time of maximum sun elevation (HH:MM:SS).

day_length.description: Day length (HH:MM:SS). '00:00:00' for polar night, '24:00:00' for polar day.

civil_twilight_begin.description: Civil twilight start — sun 6° below horizon (HH:MM:SS).

nautical_twilight_begin.description: Nautical twilight start — sun 12° below horizon (HH:MM:SS).

astronomical_twilight_begin.description: Astronomical twilight start — sun 18° below horizon (HH:MM:SS).

sunrise_azimuth_deg.description: Sun azimuth at sunrise, clockwise from north (°). 0 when no sunrise.

sunset_azimuth_deg.description: Sun azimuth at sunset, clockwise from north (°). 0 when no sunset.

noon_elevation_deg.description: Sun elevation above horizon at solar noon (°). Negative during polar night.

noon_azimuth_deg.description: Sun azimuth at solar noon — 180° (south) or 0° (north).

polar_day.description: True when the sun does not set (midnight sun).

polar_night.description: True when the sun does not rise.

current_azimuth_deg.description: Sun azimuth at the queried timestamp (°), clockwise from north.

current_elevation_deg.description: Sun elevation at the queried timestamp (°). Negative when below horizon.

current_time_local.description: Local time at the queried timestamp (HH:MM:SS) in the observer's timezone.
